zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Towers於大約1350年出生在英國林可爾史爾索莫比時，她的父親John Towers21歲，母親Isabel Staveley22歲。她和John Leeke至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1439年9月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾可坦享年90歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾可坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Towers于大约1350年出生在英国林可爾史爾索莫比时，她的父亲John Towers21岁，母亲Isabel Staveley22岁。她和John Leeke至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1439年9月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾可坦享年90岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾可坦。

nameMeanings.name: Towers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Tower , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
habitational name for someone from Tours in Indre-et-Loire, northern France, so called from the Gaulish tribal name Turones, of uncertain etymology.

variants.name: Tower
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, usually a defensive fortification or watchtower, from Middle English, Old French tūr (from Latin turris).

English: occupational name for someone who dressed white leather, cured with alum rather than tanned with bark, from an agent derivative of Middle English taw(en) (Old English tawian ‘to prepare, make ready’).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Towers was born about 1350, in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Towers, was 21 and her mother, Isabel Staveley, was 22. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with John Leeke. She died on 20 September 1439, in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Towers est née environ 1350, à Somerby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Towers, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Staveley, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec John Leeke. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1439, à Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Towers um 1350 in Somerby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Towers 21 und ihre Mutter Isabel Staveley 22. Sie hatte mit John Leeke mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. September 1439 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Towers è nata il circa 1350 nel Somerby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Towers, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabel Staveley, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con John Leeke. Morì il 20 settembre 1439, nel Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Cotham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Towersが約1350年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソメルビーで生まれた時，父John Towersは21歳，母Isabel Staveleyは22歳であった。彼女はJohn Leekeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1439年9月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコサムで90歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Towers(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 링코실르 서머비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Towers(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Staveley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 John Leeke(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 9월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르 컷함에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 컷함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Towers nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Towers, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Staveley, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com John Leeke. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1439, em Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Towers родилась около 1350 г. в местности сомирби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Towers было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Staveley, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от John Leeke. Она умерла 20 сентября 1439 г. в местности котам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности котам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Towers nació aproximadamente 1350, en Somerby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Towers, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Staveley, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con John Leeke. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1439, en Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Cotham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
